project.name: CDKTN
project.description:
CDKTN is an open-source Infrastructure as Code project born from the need to keep the CDK-style developer experience alive beyond CDKTF’s sunset.
It builds on the same idea: defining infrastructure with real programming languages instead of writing raw configuration by hand.
The project emerged as a community-driven continuation/fork path for teams that had invested in CDKTF and wanted long-term control.
Its goal is to provide a stable, extensible foundation for scalable IaC, golden paths, and platform engineering guardrails.
In short: CDKTN brings CDK-style IaC back into open source hands, with a focus on sustainability, governance, and developer experience.
